assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_026",
  "rule_id": "Set Boot Loader Password in grub2",
  "category": "too_dangerous_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "rationale": "Modifying the GRUB2 boot loader password can lock out system access if misconfigured, posing a high risk of lockout.",
  "risk_factors": [
    "bootloader password misconfiguration",
    "potential lockout of console/SSH access"
  ],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Backup /etc/default/grub",
    "Test password change in maintenance mode before permanent application",
    "Document current GRUB configuration"
  ],
  "requires_reboot": true,
  "touches_authn_authz": false,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": false
}
